name: tinyfish
description: The complete web toolkit for your agent. Search the web and get answers in milliseconds. Fetch any URL and get clean markdown content back. Send a browser agent to navigate sites, fill forms, and extract structured data. Spin up a headless browser for full programmatic control when you need it. Plus workflow skills built on top: watch pages for changes, QA your local app through a tunnel, build dashboards from web data, bulk-extract URL lists to spreadsheets, and act on the web like a human — clearing consent and cookie walls automatically and handing CAPTCHAs off to you instead of getting stuck.
